title: Meet May and Find the First View
summary: Begin the loop by greeting May and getting ready to find the viewpoint.
objectives: Greet May at the viewpoint stop.
Learn the first friendly travel phrase.
Get ready to ask for the road next.
description: You have just arrived at the first Ha Giang viewpoint. Greet May, your local guide, so she can help you begin the loop with confidence.

title: Explain the Bike Problem
summary: Tell Binh what feels wrong with the motorbike before the road climbs higher.
objectives: Name the bike part with a problem.
Stay calm and clear at the repair stall.
description: Before leaving town, your bike does not feel right. Use simple English with Binh so the bike is safe for the next mountain road.

title: Make a Safe Route Plan
summary: Ask May about road safety and say a careful plan before you ride on.
objectives: Ask if the road is safe today.
Tell May you will stop before dark.
description: Clouds are moving over the pass. Check the route with May and choose a safe, realistic travel plan for the afternoon.

title: Check In at Lan's Homestay
summary: Arrive after the ride, check in with Lan, and get ready for a warm dinner.
objectives: Tell Lan you have a room for tonight.
description: The sun is low when you reach Lan's family homestay. Check in politely so you can rest, eat, and continue the loop tomorrow.

title: Complete the Ha Giang Travel Page
summary: Bring together the guide, mechanic, and homestay conversations into one complete travel day.
objectives: Handle the bike repair with Binh.
Eat and sleep respectfully at Lan's homestay.
Review the most useful Ha Giang phrases.
description: Finish one coherent Ha Giang travel day: meet your guide, keep the bike safe, join dinner, and learn the homestay rhythm before earning the loop stamp.
